items.example: I have a vivid memory of my first day at school.
The memory is still very vivid after all these years.
I can't recall exactly what happened.
They spent the evening reminiscing about their childhood.
The old photos filled her with nostalgia.
It was one of the most memorable trips I've ever had.
The view made a lasting impression on me.
She has happy memories of her childhood.
I had a sudden flashback to that day.
